# Design Alignment Plan — 今天吃什么

## 1. Visual Inputs

- **Semantic UI protocol:** `.arkpilot/designs/ui-tree.json`
- **Final DESIGN artifact:** `.arkpilot/designs/DESIGN2.md`
- **HTML artifacts:**
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-home-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-wheel-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-fridge-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-checkin-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-share-page.html`
  - `.arkpilot/designs/page-profile-page.html`
- **Route-worthy page list:**
  | Surface | Page ID | Route | HTML artifact |
  |---------|---------|-------|---------------|
  | Home | home-page | pages/Home | `page-home-page.html` |
  | Wheel | wheel-page | pages/Wheel | `page-wheel-page.html` |
  | Fridge | fridge-page | pages/Fridge | `page-fridge-page.html` |
  | CheckIn | checkin-page | pages/CheckIn | `page-checkin-page.html` |
  | Share | share-page | pages/Share | `page-share-page.html` |
  | Profile | profile-page | pages/Profile | `page-profile-page.html` |

## 2. Semantic UI Binding

### Surfaces / Routes / Tabs
| Surface ID | Page ID | Route | Tab ID |
|------------|---------|-------|--------|
| home | home-page | pages/Home | tab-home |
| wheel | wheel-page | pages/Wheel | — |
| fridge | fridge-page | pages/Fridge | tab-fridge |
| checkin | checkin-page | pages/CheckIn | tab-checkin |
| share | share-page | pages/Share | — |
| profile | profile-page | pages/Profile | tab-profile |

### Semantic IDs to preserve in ArkTS `.id(...)`
| ID | Role | Page/Component | Binding/Event |
|----|------|----------------|---------------|
| home-greeting | assertion | Home | `/user/greeting` |
| home-spin-button | action | Home | `open-wheel` |
| home-filter-mood | input | Home | `set-mood-filter` |
| home-filter-time | input | Home | `set-time-filter` |
| home-last-result-card | assertion | Home | `/lastResult` |
| home-quick-checkin-button | action | Home | `open-checkin-sheet` |
| wheel-back-button | action | Wheel | `navigate-back` |
| wheel-canvas | assertion | Wheel | `/wheel/state` |
| wheel-spin-trigger | action | Wheel | `spin-wheel` |
| wheel-result-name | assertion | Wheel | `/wheel/result/name` |
| wheel-result-tags | assertion | Wheel | `/wheel/result/tags` |
| wheel-accept-button | action | Wheel | `accept-result` |
| wheel-retry-button | action | Wheel | `retry-spin` |
| wheel-filter-chip-group | input | Wheel | `toggle-filter` |
| fridge-ingredient-input | input | Fridge | `add-ingredient` |
| fridge-add-button | action | Fridge | `confirm-add-ingredient` |
| fridge-ingredient-list | list | Fridge | `/fridge/ingredients` |
| fridge-remove-button | action | Fridge (per item) | `remove-ingredient` |
| fridge-matched-dish-list | list | Fridge | `/fridge/matchedDishes` |
| fridge-clear-all-button | action | Fridge | `clear-ingredients` |
| checkin-today-date | assertion | CheckIn | `/checkin/todayDate` |
| checkin-add-button | action | CheckIn | `open-checkin-sheet` |
| checkin-timeline-list | list | CheckIn | `/checkin/todayItems` |
| checkin-week-summary | assertion | CheckIn | `/checkin/weekSummary` |
| checkin-sheet-dish-name | input | CheckInSheet | `set-checkin-dish` |
| checkin-sheet-note | input | CheckInSheet | `set-checkin-note` |
| checkin-sheet-meal-type | input | CheckInSheet | `set-meal-type` |
| checkin-sheet-save-button | action | CheckInSheet | `save-checkin` |
| checkin-sheet-cancel-button | action | CheckInSheet | `close-checkin-sheet` |
| share-back-button | action | Share | `navigate-back` |
| share-card-preview | assertion | Share | `/share/cardData` |
| share-card-title | assertion | Share | `/share/cardData/title` |
| share-card-caption | input | Share | `edit-share-caption` |
| share-card-theme-picker | input | Share | `set-share-theme` |
| share-system-button | action | Share | `share-to-system` |
| share-save-image-button | action | Share | `save-card-image` |
| profile-cuisine-preference | input | Profile | `toggle-cuisine` |
| profile-dietary-restriction | input | Profile | `toggle-dietary` |
| profile-clear-history-button | action | Profile | `clear-history` |
| profile-export-data-button | action | Profile | `export-data` |

### Repeated Item ID Strategy
- Fridge ingredients: `fridge-ingredient-{id}`
- Fridge matched dishes: `fridge-dish-{id}`
- Check-in timeline items: `checkin-item-{id}`

### Empty / Loading / Error State IDs
- `home-no-result-yet`
- `fridge-empty-state`
- `fridge-no-match-state`
- `checkin-empty-state`

### Preserved Event Names
`open-wheel`, `spin-wheel`, `accept-result`, `retry-spin`, `set-mood-filter`, `set-time-filter`, `toggle-filter`, `add-ingredient`, `confirm-add-ingredient`, `remove-ingredient`, `clear-ingredients`, `open-checkin-sheet`, `close-checkin-sheet`, `set-checkin-dish`, `set-checkin-note`, `set-meal-type`, `save-checkin`, `share-to-system`, `save-card-image`, `edit-share-caption`, `set-share-theme`, `toggle-cuisine`, `toggle-dietary`, `clear-history`, `export-data`, `navigate-back`.

## 3. Visual Requirements

### Global Tokens
- **Page background:** warm cream `#FFF9F5` with optional `linear-gradient(165deg, #FFF9F5 0%, #FFE8D9 55%, #FFD4BD 100%)` on hero pages.
- **Primary accent:** Coral `#FF6B4A`; gradient `linear-gradient(135deg, #FF6B4A 0%, #FF8C61 100%)`.
- **Secondary accents:** Golden `#FFC857`, Sage `#88B04B`.
- **Text on light:** Charcoal `#2D2A26`, Stone `#6B6560`.
- **Text on dark/coral:** White / `rgba(255,255,255,0.80)`.
- **Card radius:** 20–28px.
- **Button radius:** 999px (full pill).
- **Chip radius:** 999px.
- **Shadows:**
  - Card Float: `0 10px 28px rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.10)`
  - Elevated Card: `0 18px 48px rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.14)`
  - Button Glow: `0 6px 18px rgba(255, 107, 74, 0.36)`
  - Wheel Float: `0 24px 64px rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.18)`
  - Sheet Shadow: `0 -10px 48px rgba(45, 42, 38, 0.20)`

### Typography
- Font: `"Inter", "PingFang SC", "HarmonyOS Sans", -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif`
- Hero greeting: 34px/800
- Page title: 28px/800
- Card title: 22px/700
- Body: 16px/450
- Caption: 13px/550

### Per-Page Notes

#### Home
- Header greeting + subline top-left.
- Hero card is the dominant element; contains wheel-illustration circle, title, subtitle, and primary CTA.
- Mood and time filter chips directly below hero card.
- Last-result card shows dish name, tags, share/打卡 actions.
- Quick-checkin row at bottom of scrollable content.

#### Wheel
- Top bar with back button and centered page title.
- Wheel canvas is 300px diameter, centered, with SVG segments, top pointer, and center GO button.
- Result panel below wheel with result name, tags, accept/retry actions.
- Quick filter chip group at bottom.

#### Fridge
- Header + ingredient input card (text input + add button).
- Ingredient tags appear below input as removable chips.
- Matched dish list with thumbnail, dish name, match note, tags.
- Empty state when no ingredients or no matches.

#### CheckIn
- Header with date and add button.
- Golden weekly summary card.
- Today timeline list.
- Bottom sheet for adding a check-in (meal type, dish name, note, save/cancel).

#### Share
- Top bar with back button.
- Share card preview centered, 4:5 aspect ratio, 280px wide.
- Theme picker swatches below card.
- Save / Share actions at bottom.

#### Profile
- Header.
- Coral profile card with avatar and meta.
- Cuisine preference card with toggle chips.
- Dietary restriction card with toggle chips.
- Action list for export data and clear history.

### HTML-to-ArkUI Mapping Notes
- The fixed-position bottom tab bar maps to HarmonyOS `Tabs` with `barPosition: BarPosition.End`.
- Each tab item icon is an SVG `Image` component with `fillColor` driven by active state.
- The wheel can be implemented with a custom `Canvas` drawing or an SVG `Image` with rotation animation; the pointer remains fixed at top.
- Bottom sheet maps to a modal `Sheet` or custom `Panel`.
- Share card preview is a composed `Stack`/`Column` with gradients and blurred decorative circles (`Blur` or `BackdropBlur`).
- Cards map to `Column` + `borderRadius` + `shadow`.
- Chips map to `Button` with capsule radius and selected state styling.

## 4. Non-Negotiable Constraints

1. **Do not rename** semantic IDs, page IDs, routes, tab IDs, or event names.
2. **Bottom navigation only.** Tabs must be at the bottom and constrained to the centered container width (max 390–420vp). No side or top tabs.
3. **Container max-width:** 390–420vp, centered. Do not stretch content full-width on PC browser previews.
